detectors.description:
FrozenChecker.check(FrozenChecker.Rule,uint256) (YottaCoin.sol#157-189) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- self.timeT == uint256(0) || self.timeT > now (YottaCoin.sol#167)
	- now >= self.timeT.add(self.periods[i]) && now < self.timeT.add(self.periods[i.add(1)]) (YottaCoin.sol#175)
	- now >= self.timeT.add(self.periods[self.periods.length.sub(1)]) (YottaCoin.sol#183)
